summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Ariadne Editorial Studio. Backend APIs confirmed 100% working. Frontend UI loads correctly but login form has critical bug preventing authentication flow completion.

critical_bugs.issue: Login form not processing successful authentication response - backend returns correct token but frontend doesn't handle redirect/state update
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot login through the UI despite valid credentials and working backend
critical_bugs.technical_details: Backend API returns 200 with valid JWT token, but frontend loginJWT function or AuthContext not updating user state properly
critical_bugs.test_evidence: Direct API call succeeded: status 200, valid token returned. Frontend remains on /login page after form submission.

ui_bugs.issue: Page shows loading state indefinitely when navigating with expired/invalid auth token

passed_tests: Dashboard page loads correctly with manual auth
Navigation sidebar works - all 8 menu items accessible
Social Profiles page - Shows 5 profiles as required (Ariadne Training LinkedIn, Arianna Perrone LinkedIn, Emanuele Ciccarelli LinkedIn, Emanuele Casero LinkedIn, Ariadne Instagram)
Courses page structure loads (shows 3 courses including Core Coaching Program 2026)
Workflow page loads with wizard steps (Campagna, Profili, Agenti, Pianifica, Genera, Revisione)
Repository page loads with file upload functionality and categories
Approvals page loads with filters and post management
Italian UI text and beautiful design throughout application
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend login form authentication flow: The loginJWT function in AuthContext.js or login form handler is not properly processing the successful backend response (token + user data). Backend confirmed working 100%. Need to debug AuthContext state management and navigation after login.
